original: Pupper Popper
a Pupper Popper

This red, plastic-wrapped treat is a promotional transformative sold alongside traditional Canine Poppers. It’s advertised as capable of replicating several rarer canine traits that are impossible to achieve with traditional Canine Poppers, resulting in a distinctly more feral appearance. The bone-shaped wrapping says it tastes like well-seasoned meat.

You unwrap the scientifically enhanced morsel and toss the bite-sized treat in your mouth. You chew on it for a while, delighting in the juicy meat flavors dancing on your tongue. Once the taste starts to fade, you swallow it all down and wait.
